project_type: Next.js full-stack dashboard application with background job processing
build_system: npm with Next.js build system, Docker Compose for services (PostgreSQL/SQLite, Redis, BullMQ)
test_framework: Jest with React Testing Library for components, integration tests for API routes
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation and Next.js build. 2. Run npm test to verify all tests pass. 3. Run docker compose build to verify container builds.
setup_instructions: 1. npm install to install dependencies. 2. Copy .env.example to .env and configure. 3. npx prisma generate to generate Prisma client. 4. npx prisma db push to create database schema. 5. npm run dev to start development server.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full external access available. Node.js 22 with npm/pnpm/yarn available. Docker available for container builds.
contribution_requirements: Use environment variables for all secrets. Never commit .env files. Use .env.example with placeholders only. Protect admin pages. Store logs without leaking secrets.
key_patterns: Next.js App Router with TypeScript, TailwindCSS for styling, Prisma ORM with SQLite (PostgreSQL-ready), BullMQ for background job processing with Redis, Server-side Google Docs fetching via published document export URLs, MCP tool calls via server-side HTTP requests to configured endpoints
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages and API routes | src/lib/ - shared utilities (prompt-loader, mcp-client, queue) | src/workers/ - BullMQ worker processes | src/components/ - React UI components | prisma/ - database schema and migrations | public/ - static assets | docker/ - Docker configuration files
